name: Pudding Cheese Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 4-oz package Instant Vanilla, Lemon, Coconut, or Pineapple pudding mix
recipeInstructions:
1. With an electric mixer on low speed, beat the cream cheese until very soft.
2. Gradually add 1/2 cup of the cold milk, beating until smooth.
3. Add the remaining milk and the pie filling mix, beating at a low speed for 1 minute until blended.
4. Pour the mixture into the prepared pie crust.
5. Chill until firm, about 2 hours.
Variations:
Strawberry Cheese Pie:
Prepare Pudding Cheese Pie as directed, using vanilla pudding. Reduce the milk to 1 1/2 cups and fold in 1 cup sliced fresh strawberries. If desired, add a few drops of red food coloring to the pie filling before pouring into the crust. Garnish with additional sliced strawberries if desired.
Strawberry Almond Cheese Pie:
Combine 1 cup sliced fresh strawberries, 1/4 cup chopped toasted almonds, and 1 tablespoon sugar in the bottom of the prepared pie crust. Prepare Pudding Cheese Pie as directed, using vanilla pudding. Pour over the strawberry mixture in the pie crust. Garnish with whipped topping and additional strawberries if desired.
